file_path.description: Path to the log file to search.

query.description: Text or regex pattern to search for.

mode.description: Search mode: 'text' for case-insensitive substring, 'regex' for regular expression.

max_results.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return.

context_lines.description: Number of surrounding context lines to include with each match.

invert.description: If true, return lines that do NOT match the query.
